executives.name: Gerard Bond
executives.background: Mr. Bond was appointed President and CEO in April 2022. He has over 25 years of experience in the global financial and resources industry, including 10 years at Newcrest Mining as CFO and several senior executive roles at BHP.

executives.name: Marius van Niekerk
executives.background: Mr. van Niekerk joined OceanaGold in 2023. He has more than 25 years of experience in the mining and resources industry, having held senior financial and commercial roles at Newcrest Mining and BHP.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Peter Sharpe
executives.background: Mr. Sharpe joined OceanaGold in 2022. He is a mining executive with over 25 years of experience in the resources industry, including senior leadership roles at Newcrest Mining and BHP.

executives.name: Bhuvaneshwar Singh
executives.background: Mr. Singh joined OceanaGold in 2023. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in technical services, project development, and operations, with previous roles at Newcrest Mining.

executives.name: Michelle Du Plessis
executives.background: Ms. Du Plessis joined OceanaGold in 2022. She has over 20 years of experience in human resources and organizational development within the mining and resources sector.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Benson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Benson was appointed as Chairman in 2021. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including as CEO of SSR Mining and CEO of Troy Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Gerard Bond
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of OceanaGold. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Reid
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Reid is a former senior executive at Caterpillar Inc. with extensive experience in global mining equipment and technology.

board_of_directors.name: Linda Broughton
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Broughton is a senior environmental and mining professional with over 30 years of experience in risk management and sustainability.

board_of_directors.name: Catherine Gignac
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Gignac has over 30 years of experience in capital markets and the mining industry, including as a mining equity research analyst.

board_of_directors.name: Alan Sparks
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sparks is a Chartered Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior financial roles at Deloittes and various mining companies.

sources.source_description: OceanaGold Official Website - Board and Management Profiles
